title: Vintage Le Creuset / Cousances Cast Iron Crepe Pan No.5 – Made in France (1950–1960)
description:
Beautiful vintage crepe pan from Le Creuset, produced under the Cousances line – the premium range of Le Creuset – made in France during the 1950s–1960s. This No.5 pan is perfect for enjoying a crepe party or making pancakes, eggs, and other skillet dishes with ease.
Crafted from high-quality cast iron, it provides excellent heat retention, slowly and evenly distributing heat for perfect cooking results. Suitable for all heat sources, including induction, making it both versatile and practical for modern kitchens.
Details:
Brand: Le Creuset / Cousances premium line
Type: Crepe pan / skillet
Model: No.5
Material: Cast iron
Origin: Made in France
Period: Vintage, 1950–1960
Compatible with all stovetops, including induction
Condition:
Very good vintage condition. Please see photos, which form part of the description.
A rare and collectible piece from one of France’s most iconic cookware brands, perfect for collectors or anyone looking to add a touch of vintage charm and professional-quality performance to their kitchen.
